keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY NOSE AND ACCESSORY CAVITIES. Nose and accessory cavities : Aco., Aesc., Alu., Ars., Aur., Calc-c., Grap., Hep., Hyds., Ign., Iod., Kali-bi., Kali-io., Lyc., Merc-i-f., Merc., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Sep., Sil., Spig., Sul. Nose and accessory cavities, one side of : Am-m., Hep., Ign., Nux-v., Pho., Phyt., Saba., Sil., Sinap. Nose and accessory cavities, one side of, right : Con., Mar-v., Spig. Nose and accessory cavities, one side of, left : Carb-v., Nat-m., Rhod., Sep. Nose and accessory cavities, one side of, alternating between : Kali-io., Lac-c., Lach., Mez., Nux-v., Pho., Rhod., Sinap. Nose and accessory cavities, external : Aur., Carb-v., Caust., Kali-c., Merc., Nat-c., Pho-ac., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Spig., Sul. Nose and accessory cavities, internal : Ars-io., Ars., Aur., Bell., Calc-c., Cepa., Euphr., Grap., Kali-bi., Kali-io., Mar-v., Saba., Sil., Spig., Stict. Nose and accessory cavities, internal, posterior : Hyds., Lyc., Merc-i-r., Merc., Nat-c., Nat-m., Pho., Sep., Spig., Stap., Sul. Nose and accessory cavities, root and above : Aco., Ars., Calc-c., Gels., Hep., Hyo., Ign., Kali-bi., Kali-io., Merc., Pho., Pul., Sang., Sul., Zin. Nose and accessory cavities, bones : Aur., Merc., Pho. Nose and accessory cavities, bridge : Pho-ac., Sep., Thu. Nose and accessory cavities, tip : Carb-an., Carb-v., Caust., Sep. Nose and accessory cavities, wings : Lyc., Thu. Nose and accessory cavities, air , open, amel. : Aco., Cepa., Hyds., Iod., Nux-v., Pul., Tell. Nose and accessory cavities, alæ , motions : Ant-t., Ars., Brom., Chel., Cup., Lyc. , Pho. , Pyro., Spo., Sul-ac., Zin. Nose and accessory cavities, boring into, with fingers, picking at, itching : Aru-t., Carb-v., Caust., Cina., Lyc., Merc., Nat-m., Pho-ac., Pho., Sil., Spig., Sul., Zin. Nose and accessory cavities, coryza (fluent discharges) : Aco., Ars., Cam., Cepa., Cham., Euphr., Fer-p., Gels., Hep., Kali-io., Lach., Merc-c., Merc., Nux-v., Pul., Rhus-t., Sele., Sul. Nose and accessory cavities, coryza, annual (hay fever) : Ambros., Ars., Gels., Kali-io., Kali-p., Nux-v., Pho., Psor., Senec., Sep., Sil., Sul. Nose and accessory cavities, coryza, chronic : Hep., Kali-bi., Sil., Sul. Nose and accessory cavities, coryza, coughing, agg. : Agar., Lach., Nit-ac., Squil., Sul., Thu. Nose and accessory cavities, coryza, menses, at ; menstrual colds : Am-c., Grap., Kali-c., Lach., Mag-c., Pho., Zin. Nose and accessory cavities, coryza, stopped : Ars., Aru-t., Brom., Calc-c., Lach., Lyc., Mar-v., Nit-ac., Nux-v. Nose and accessory cavities, crusts , scabs : Alu., Aur., Grap., Kali-bi., Merc., Nit-ac., Sep., Stict., Sul., Thu. Nose and accessory cavities, dark , sooty nostrils : Ant-t., Crot-h., Hell., Hyo. Nose and accessory cavities, dilated alæ : Cup. Nose and accessory cavities, dripping : Ars., Aru-t., Calc-c., Cepa., Eup-p., Euphr., Grap., Kali-io., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Saba., Sul., Tab. Nose and accessory cavities, dry : Bell., Bry., Grap., Lyc., Nat-m., Pho., Sep., Sil., Sinap., Stict., Sul. Nose and accessory cavities, epistaxis : Ham. Nose and accessory cavities, epistaxis, recurrent : Fer-p. Nose and accessory cavities, epistaxis, from coughing (Comp. Hæmorrhage.) : Bell., Dros., Lach., Nux-v., Pho. Nose and accessory cavities, excoriated : Ars-io., Ars., Aru-t., Cepa., Gels., Iod., Kali-io., Merc-c., Merc., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Sinap. Nose and accessory cavities, fetor : Aur., Calc-c., Grap., Hep., Kali-bi., Merc., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pul., Sul. Nose and accessory cavities, glutinous discharge : Hep., Kali-bi., Merc-c. Nose and accessory cavities, green discharge : Kali-io., Merc., Nit-ac., Pul., Sep. Nose and accessory cavities, gushes , fluid : Dulc., Flu-ac., Hyds., Kali-bi., Lach., Nat-c., Nat-m., Pho., Sele., Thu. Nose and accessory cavities, lumpy discharge : Alu., Kali-bi., Sele., Sep., Sil. Nose and accessory cavities, painful : Hep., Merc. Nose and accessory cavities, polypi : Calc-c., Mar-v., Merc-i-r., Pho., Sang., Thu. Nose and accessory cavities, pus from : Aur., Calc-c., Con., Hep., Lach., Merc., Pul. Nose and accessory cavities, raw , sore posteriorly : Aco., Carb-v., Kali-n., Sep. Nose and accessory cavities, red : Alu., Ap., Aur., Bell., Calc-c., Cann., Chel., Merc., Pho., Rhus-t., Sul. Nose and accessory cavities, saddle across, brown : Carb-an., Lyc., Op., Sanic., Sep., Sul. Nose and accessory cavities, smell : Aur., Bell., Calc-c., Colch., Grap., Hep., Lyc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Sep., Sil., Sul. Nose and accessory cavities, smell, illusory, earth, as of : Ver-a. Nose and accessory cavities, smell, illusory, foul : Bell., Par., Pul. Nose and accessory cavities, smell, illusory, sulphur, as of : Nux-v. Nose and accessory cavities, smell, weak : Bell., Calc-c., Hyo., Nat-m., Plb., Pul., Sep., Sil. Nose and accessory cavities, sneezing : Ars-io., Ars., Carb-v., Cepa., Cina., Gels., Kali-io., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pul., Rhus-t., Saba., Sil., Sul. Nose and accessory cavities, sneezing, abortive : Carb-v., Sil. Nose and accessory cavities, sneezing, cough, with : Agar., Bell., Psor., Squil. Nose and accessory cavities, sneezing, violent : Nux-v., Saba. Nose and accessory cavities, swelled : Bell., Caust., Kali-c., Merc., Nat-c., Pho-ac., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep. Nose and accessory cavities, twitching : Am-c., Amb., Aur., Calc-c., Chel., Con., Hyo., Kali-bi., Nat-m., Plat. Nose and accessory cavities, ulcers : Ars., Merc., Pul. Nose and accessory cavities, weather , changing, agg. : Ars. Nose and accessory cavities, winter , agg. : Am-c., Ars. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
